  Details:
  Documented the evidence gate for opening new Google Places metros into the retail Hit List funnel, as an OPEN_FOLLOWUPS entry: quality gates from WARMUP_AUTOSEND_PLAN.md section 6 (auto-sent cohort reply rate >=5% over >=50 sends, bounce <2%, zero spam complaints, operator reply latency <24h median) plus a starvation trigger (clean-tier pending supply below ~3 send-days), region priority by existing signal density (Portland/Seattle first), a tagged pure-remote experiment cohort before national expansion, and an optional v2 thermostat workflow that auto-runs discovery when the gate is green. Key sizing principle recorded: expansion extends runway at the 12/day deliverability-safe drip rather than raising the cap; operator conversation bandwidth is the true ceiling.
